name: MyFundedFutures

title: MyFundedFutures Decoded — Builder vs Rapid vs Pro
excerpt: One firm, three payout philosophies. Builder's ladder to live, Rapid's daily cash flow, Pro's full-size cap — routed by how you actually trade.
eyebrow: Sire Mammat's Lab · Prop Firm Intel · July 2026

content.heading: One Firm, Three Doors
content.body: Most comparisons pit firms against each other. This one is intramural: MyFundedFutures runs three plan families with genuinely different philosophies, and picking between them matters more than most cross-firm choices. Fast entry, fast payouts, or full size — the plan should match how you already trade, not how you hope to.

content.heading: The Honest Caveats
content.body: Rapid's headline numbers are real — 90/10, daily payouts, no DLL — but its sim-funded stage runs intraday trailing drawdown, which punishes anyone who holds through pullbacks. Builder's soft-pause is a feature for traders who need an external kill switch, and a leash for those who don't. Pro's EOD drawdown is the calmest of the three, priced accordingly. There is no best plan; there is the plan that matches your discipline profile.

content.heading: Routing Guide
content.body: New or rebuilding trader → Builder (1-day pass, kill switch built in, clearest live path). Scalper banking profits daily → Rapid (90/10, daily payouts — accept the intraday trailing). Proven trader sizing up → Pro (full contracts, $100K cap, EOD calm).

verdict.heading: The Lab Verdict — Ranked by Fit, Not Hype
paragraphs: This is a routing decision, not a horse race. All three plans carry zero activation fees and zero funded consistency rules — the differentiators are payout philosophy and drawdown temperament.

Our fit picks: Builder wins for structure — the only plan with a published fixed ladder to a live brokerage account and a built-in daily kill switch. Rapid wins for cash flow, with the best split and rhythm at MFF, provided your style survives intraday trailing. Pro wins for scale — the plan traders graduate to once they have proof.

ranking.name: Builder — best for new & rebuilding traders
ranking.reason: 1-day pass, no eval consistency, 48-hour payouts, and the clearest published path to live capital.

ranking.name: Rapid — best for daily-banking scalpers
ranking.reason: 90/10 split and daily payouts; the intraday trailing drawdown is the price of admission.

ranking.name: Pro — best for proven size
ranking.reason: Full contracts day one, $100K sim payout cap, EOD trailing calm.

disclaimers: Futures trading involves substantial risk of loss and is not suitable for all investors. Funded accounts are simulated trading accounts; payouts are made under MyFundedFutures' published terms. Links may carry affiliate code MOT — the Lab may earn a commission at no cost to you. Specs reflect MFF's published terms at time of writing (July 2026 promo cycle); always confirm pricing and rules directly before purchasing.
